# GitHub Copilot Repository Instructions

Use `AGENTS.md` as the canonical repository guidance.

Before coding:

1. Read `.agent-os/profile.yml`.
2. Read relevant files under `docs/product`, `docs/architecture`, and `docs/specs`.
3. Identify the smallest safe vertical slice.
4. Preserve architecture and public contracts unless explicitly asked to change them.
5. Run relevant validation commands or state why they cannot be run.
